name: AI Data Marketplace
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure Machine Learning
services.purpose: Differential privacy pipelines — synthetic data generation with privacy guarantees, anonymization workflows, statistical disclosure control, dataset quality scoring, privacy budget tracking (epsilon/delta), federated data processing without exposing raw data

dev.note: Free tier, shared compute for pipeline development

prod.note: Dedicated compute clusters, GPU for synthetic data generation

enterprise.note: Multi-cluster, auto-scaling, managed endpoints for data APIs

services.name: Azure Blob Storage
services.purpose: Dataset repository — raw dataset ingestion staging, anonymized dataset storage, synthetic dataset output, versioned dataset snapshots, preview samples, dataset documentation and schema files, audit trail logs

services.name: Azure API Management
services.purpose: Marketplace API gateway — dataset discovery APIs, purchase and licensing workflows, download token management, usage metering and billing integration, rate limiting per subscription tier, developer portal for data consumers

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Marketplace catalog — dataset metadata (schema, lineage, quality scores), publisher profiles, consumer subscriptions, transaction records, access control policies, usage analytics, review and rating data

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Marketplace workflows — dataset ingestion triggers, anonymization pipeline orchestration, purchase fulfillment (generate SAS tokens), usage metering, webhook notifications to publishers, scheduled quality re-scoring, license expiry enforcement

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Encryption keys for datasets at rest, SAS token signing keys, publisher API credentials, payment gateway secrets, differential privacy parameter storage

enterprise.note: HSM-backed, customer-managed keys for dataset encryption

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Marketplace KPIs — API latency, dataset download throughput, anonymization pipeline duration, purchase conversion rates, publisher activity, consumer engagement, privacy budget utilization

optimization_tips: Use lifecycle management policies on Blob Storage — move datasets not accessed for 30 days to Cool tier and 90 days to Archive; most marketplace datasets are downloaded shortly after purchase with long tail of inactivity, saving 60% on storage

Implement dataset preview sampling — serve lightweight statistical summaries and sample rows from Cosmos DB cache instead of generating full previews from Blob Storage; reduces egress and compute costs by 80% for browsing users

Use Azure ML pipeline caching — anonymization and synthetic generation steps produce deterministic output for the same input + privacy parameters; cache intermediate results to avoid re-processing when only downstream steps change
Right-size API Management — use Consumption tier for dev/test and scale to Standard only when marketplace traffic exceeds 1M calls/month; most early-stage marketplaces see <100K calls/month

Batch anonymization jobs during off-peak hours — schedule differential privacy pipelines for evenings/weekends when compute costs are lower and cluster utilization is minimal; dataset publishing is rarely time-sensitive
Implement download throttling and resumable downloads — reduce peak bandwidth costs by spreading large dataset downloads over time; use CDN for popular datasets accessed from multiple regions
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
